CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Lawrence Maynard Schwab, Esq., for Plaintiff: Macromedia, Inc., A Deleware Corporation.
Witness Boris Pozharny, present, sworn and examined.
After hearing evidence, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant Tight Systems LLC., as follows: Principal: $345,000.00, Prejudgment Interest: $36,476.63, Costs: $570.00, Attorney Fees: $3,835.00. Total Judgment: $385,882.13.
Within thirty (30) days of personal service of this Judgment, Defendant is to comply with paragraph 2 of the terms as stated in the Judgment. Defendant is permanently enjoined from engaging in certain behavior that is contrary to the Judgment and those terms that are spelled out in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
